Specification

Funeral Quote Builder v2

A stepped, multi-life quoting experience that turns an enquiry into a submitted application in under three minutes.

Version  2.0 (draft)
Date  17 July 2026
Author  Product & Engineering, Asuer
Status  For review

Contents

1. Overview2
2. Goals & non-goals2
3. User flow2
4. Functional requirements3
5. Out of scope3

1. Overview

The Funeral Quote Builder lets a customer or an independent sales representative assemble cover for a whole family in one flow, see a clear premium, and move straight into an application. Version 2 replaces the single long form with a guided, stepped experience and a per-life summary.

2. Goals & non-goals

  • Goal: reduce time-to-quote to under three minutes for a family of four.
  • Goal: make per-life pricing legible before the customer commits.
  • Goal: hand a complete, validated payload to the application step.
  • Non-goal: underwriting logic changes (rates and rules are unchanged for v2).

3. User flow

  1. Choose the main member and cover tier.
  2. Add additional lives (spouse, children, extended family) with per-life tiers.
  3. Review a per-life and total premium summary.
  4. Confirm and continue to the application, carrying the quote forward.

Design principle

Every step must be answerable in one screen without scrolling on a mid-range phone. If a step needs scrolling, it needs splitting.

4. Functional requirements

RefRequirementPriority
FR-1Support up to 8 lives across the 5 defined relationship groups.Must
FR-2Show a live total premium that updates as lives and tiers change.Must
FR-3Persist the quote so a returning user resumes where they left off.Should
FR-4Pass the full quote payload to /insure-funeral/apply as structured data.Must
FR-5Offer a shareable quote summary the representative can send on WhatsApp.Could

5. Out of scope

Payment collection, policy issue, and document generation are handled downstream and are explicitly out of scope for this specification.
